hero.headline: Your child's relationship with technology can change quickly.
hero.subheadline: You're not powerless. Get a personalized, evidence-based behavior change plan made to minimize concerning behaviors, reduce conflict and align you and your child on a shared vision of digital health.

problem.heading: Sound Familiar?
problem.subheading: You're not alone — these are the worries we hear from families every day.

quotes.quote: Conversations about devices keep turning into arguments.
He's glued to his screen from the moment he wakes up.
Parental controls aren't enough, and therapy feels out of reach.
I feel like he's missing out on real life.

sections.title: A Plan for You & Your Child
sections.body: We combine our team's leading pediatric digital health expertise with AI‑powered personalization to create 8-week plans designed to drive measurable change.

sections.title: Share What Matters
sections.body: Tell us about your child's current relationship with technology, your family's goals, and what you've already tried. The more we know, the better we can tailor a plan that actually fits your family.

sections.title: Use & Tune
sections.body: Work through your personalized 8-week plan week by week, completing structured tasks at your own pace. Quick check-in surveys along the way help us refine your guidance as your situation evolves.

sections.title: Always Be Supported
sections.body: Ali, our AI assistant, is available any time to answer questions or help you navigate a difficult moment. When you need a human, our coaching team is a message away.

panels.title: Clinical Experience
panels.body: Our plans are grounded in 30 years of pediatric digital health research and care led by Dr. Michael Rich, founding director of the Digital Wellness Lab at Boston Children's Hospital. His clinical experience — built from the thousands of families with whom he's worked — is at the heart of the guidance we provide.

panels.title: A Proven Approach
panels.body: Our plans are built on COM-B, a proven behavior change framework that looks at three things: Does your child have the skills to manage technology? Does their environment make healthy choices realistic? Do they have reasons to change? By addressing all three — not just setting rules — we help families make changes that actually stick.

pricing.heading: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subheading:
Start with a plan.
Stay as long as you need.

plans.name: Initial 8-Week Plan
plans.description: A personalized digital wellness plan built around your child's habits and your family's goals — delivered in eight structured weeks with AI coaching and expert guidance every step of the way.

plans.name: Ongoing Plans & Support
plans.description: Keep the momentum going. For less than the cost of a single coaching session, continue accessing Ali, your coaching team, and ongoing micro-plans as your child grows and your situation evolves.

valueHighlights: 24/7 AI coaching available any time via chat
Weekly check-ins that adapt to your plan
Plan updates based on your progress

comparison.heading: How alignd compares
comparison.subheading: Coaching that builds lasting habits — not another session to schedule or app to police.

rows.label: Goal
rows.alignd: Build lasting digital habits and a healthier relationship with tech

rows.label: Time commitment
rows.alignd: Work at your own pace; check-ins adapt to your progress
rows.traditional: Weekly 60-min sessions, fixed schedule, often months-long
rows.parentalTech: Quick to install; ongoing monitoring and rule-tweaking falls on you

rows.label: Availability
rows.alignd: Start today; AI coaching available any time, day or night
rows.parentalTech: Instant setup, but no human guidance when issues come up

rows.label: Personalization
rows.alignd: Plan built specifically around your child's age, habits, and your family's goals
rows.traditional: Coach's general approach applied to your situation

rows.label: Family involvement
rows.alignd: Whole-family approach built into every plan
rows.parentalTech: Parent-controlled; often feels like surveillance to kids

rows.label: Evidence base
rows.alignd: Grounded in the COM-B behavioral science framework
rows.parentalTech: Built for blocking, not behavior change

panels.quote: For the first time, my son actually agreed to some limits. The plan gave us a shared framework instead of a fight.
We'd tried apps, rules, everything. Alignd helped us understand why he was struggling — not just restrict the behavior.
Ali answered my questions at 11pm when I was spiraling. Having that support available made all the difference.
After 8 weeks I actually feel like I have tools, not just restrictions. My daughter's relationship with her phone is genuinely different.
